source: User agreement on 2026-05-12 after identifying stale `.codewiki/index`, ambiguous `.codewiki/evidence`, and retained pass validation reports as contract drift.
summary: Accepted direction: remove deprecated `.codewiki/index` and ambiguous `.codewiki/evidence` surfaces, enforce file-contract drift, and evict cold pass validation/build artifacts from the hot working tree after safe Git archival while preserving fail/block/policy-kept validation.

diff_table.current_state: `.codewiki/index/` exists as an empty legacy directory while `.codewiki/index_graph.json` is the only generated graph/index read model.
diff_table.desired_state: Remove `.codewiki/index/` and add contract checks so legacy index directories/files are flagged as deprecated drift.
diff_table.rationale: Generated read models should have one canonical location; empty legacy dirs create confusion and drift.

diff_table.current_state: `.codewiki/evidence/` contains bootstrap/stale files and overlaps with implementation builds, validation reports, sources, and research.
diff_table.desired_state: Deprecate default `.codewiki/evidence/**`; use implementation builds for execution evidence, `.codewiki/validation/**` for hot fail/block/policy-required validation, and sources/research for external support.
diff_table.rationale: Ambiguous evidence roots duplicate truth and undermine hot-only operating context.

diff_table.current_state: All pass validation reports remain in `.codewiki/validation/**` after publication, leaking cold data into hot CodeWiki state.
diff_table.desired_state: After safe archive/publication, pass validation reports and consumed cold builds are purgeable from the hot working tree; fail/block/policy-kept validation stays hot.
diff_table.rationale: Hot CodeWiki should contain active blockers and current gates, while Git/archive refs preserve cold historical proof.

diff_table.current_state: CodeWiki did not flag stale `.wiki` references and deprecated file-contract paths as deterministic drift.
diff_table.desired_state: Lint/graph health flags deprecated paths and stale `.wiki` references so future contract drift is visible before it accumulates.
diff_table.rationale: CodeWiki should prevent file-contract drift, not merely document desired structure.

accepted_decisions.summary: This is a new task, not a patch to TASK-071: TASK-071 hid cold context by default; this work removes/evicts deprecated cold surfaces and enforces the file contract.
`.codewiki/evidence/**` should not be a default truth root.
Pass validation reports are hot only while active, policy-required, failed/blocked, or needed for current publication; otherwise Git archive is cold truth.

non_goals: Do not delete fail/block/policy-kept validation reports.
Do not delete Git archive refs or historical commits.
Do not remove implementation_build publication payloads needed for current work.
Do not rename internal Control Room code as part of this task.

roadmap: new deprecated evidence/index retention enforcement task
